   "reasoning": "I'm at my wit's end, to be honest. I see kids like Maria, Jake, and Emily struggling every day, and I know they need more support, not less. We desperately need more staff, especially counselors, and scholarships for students who are at risk of dropping out, like Maria who lost her sibling last year. If we don't get more help, I fear we'll lose even more teachers and students.",
